welcome: Want us to show you how it works?
skip: No, I'll explore on my own

steps.availableBalance: Here you see your Available Balance: how much money you have left after subtracting expenses from income
steps.quickActions: Use these buttons to quickly add expenses and incomes
steps.expenses: Here you manage all your Expenses: one-time and recurring (like Netflix, rent)
steps.incomes: Here you record your Incomes: salaries, freelance work, or any money coming in
steps.reports: Here you see Reports and charts to understand where you spend and how your finances are doing
steps.settings: Here you change your Settings: profile, language, and app preferences
